name: Baking Butter Graham Cracker Crust
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup baking butter, Mrs. Bateman's Butterlike (tbsp)
Graham crackers, lowfat, crumbed, fine (11 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften baking butter in the microwave for 20 seconds.
2. Mix softened butter with warm water.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine all ingredients and mix until moistened.
4. Divide the crumb mixture between two 9-inch vegetable-sprayed pie pans.
5. Press the mixture evenly on the bottom and up the sides of the pans.
6. Preferably, avoid making the crust too thick.
7. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
8. Cool before filling with your choice of filling.
Note: Mrs. Bateman's Butterlike is a low-fat butter substitute. If unavailable, contact Bateman's Baking Butter, Inc., 125 South State Street, Rigby, ID 83442, (800)574-6822.
